label: GPUs, TPUs & AI accelerators

node.label: GPUs, TPUs & AI accelerators
node.definition: GPUs, TPUs, NPUs, and other AI accelerators execute dense, sparse, tensor, or event-driven operations with specialized memory hierarchies and interconnects.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, GPUs, TPUs & AI accelerators is modeled as depending on Linear algebra, Numerical analysis and feeding downstream nodes such as CUDA, ROCm, Triton & custom kernels, Quantized inference & compressed deployment, Edge, on-device & neuromorphic deployment.

atlas downstream link to Edge, on-device & neuromorphic deployment
limitations: Operational gains introduce new failure modes in concurrency, versioning, security, numerical behavior, observability, and cost. Its direct dependencies include Linear algebra, Numerical analysis.
